programme.title: Anjaana Anjaaani
programme.desc: The film of two strangers, who meet on a bridge intending to commit suicide. After bonding over their shared miseries,they make a pact to live life to the fullest for the next 20 days and explore various adventures together. As they embark on this trip, they begin to develop feelings for each other, leading to a complex and emotional journey. Will they embrace their new-found love or stick to their original plan?

programme.title: Parwana
programme.desc: Parwana spends his days brightening the lives of the downtrodden with a series of odd jobs. Just as Parwana falls in love and marries the girl of his dreams, a group of vicious criminals label him a traitor and Parwana is thrown behind bars. Despite the mafia's best attempts to permanently silent Parwana as he languishes in jail, the daring hero escapes and sets out on a mission to clear his name and expose the real criminals.

programme.title: Mission Istanbul
programme.desc: An action thriller film that follows the story of a journalist, Vikas, who is sent to Istanbul to cover a breaking news story. However, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy involving international terrorism and political corruption. The movie features high-octane action sequences and explores themes of courage, patriotism, and the importance of journalistic integrity in a thrilling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: A story of a con artist, Varun who falls in love with Pakhi, daughter of a wealthy landowner. Varun and his partner deceive Pakhi's father by pretending to be archaeologists in search of a hidden treasure. But their plan goes awry when Varun starts to develop genuine feelings for Pakhi. Their love story is a poignant and tragic tale of sacrifice and redemption.

programme.desc: [Track List] 1. INTRO : DREAMSCAPE 5. No Escape NCT DREAM's 4th full-length album 「DREAMSCAPE」 follows their previous release 「DREAM( )SCAPE」, portraying the group's second journey as they break away from a dark, desensitized reality in search of an ideal dreamlike space. 7. YOU 9. Night Poem 6. Best of Me 3. Flying Kiss The title 「DREAMSCAPE」 signifies a long-awaited, dreamlike landscape and world, capturing the excitement and freedom of youth within this utopian realm. Across 11 tracks, a dynamic storyline unfolds like a fairytale, vividly portraying the radiant moments of youth in a dramatic way. 2. When I'm With You 10. Off The Wall 4. i hate fruits 11. Rains in Heaven8. Heavenly

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is producer and singer-songwriter NIve! This artist made himself known to the public in 2014 through the show Superstar K Season 6 where he finished in the Top 9. Then in 2018 he made his debut in the U.S. with the single Getaway and his 2019 single Who I Am had its exclusive worldwide premiere via Billboard Magazine. As a talented songwriter NIve has also written composed and produced songs for major K-Pop artists including EXO EXO's CHEN Paul Kim Sam Kim Jeong Se-woon HYNN and more cementing his place as an established singer-songwriter capable of writing music in a myriad of genres. In this episode NIve performs Like a Fool Tired Who I Am and more to show off his musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and let him feast your soul!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is Kim Sa-wol! This artist made her big debut in 2014 as a member of the folk duo Kim Sawol x Kim Hae Won and enchanted many with the debut mini-album Secret. That year the two won the Best Rookie Artist and the Best Folk Album at the prestigious Korean Music Awards. The next year Kim Sa-wol released her first solo album Suzanne and then the second solo album Romance winning a total of 5 awards at the Korean Music Awards between 2014 and 2018. This past September Kim Sa-wol dropped her third release as a solo artist. Titled Heaven It illustrates her honest stories and feelings including loneliness life's uncertainty frustration and more. Her wispy voice and the bittersweet mood blend well in this new masterpiece. In this episode Kim Sa-wol performs Disposable KEY Fugitive Yellow Signal and Someone to offer an exquisite glimpse into her stunning musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and enjoy her intimate dreamy music!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is versatile artist Hong Isaac! This artist made his debut in the music scene after winning the Bronze Prize at the 24th Yoo Jae-ha Music Contest in 2013 with his self-written song Spring. Then in 2019 he pleasantly surprised the public once again with his heartwarming voice and versatile qualities as a musician through the TV whos Super Band. He also participated in the film De Capo as the male protagonist and music director to show off his natural talents. In this episode Hong Isaac performs his latest single Without You The Sea featured in the movie De Capo Beach Again Let's Be Friends Like A Star and A Boy. Tune in to I'm LIVE and check out all he has in store for us! Tune in to I'm LIVE and enjoy the essence of his artistry!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is O.WHEN with a heart-comforting voice! This artist made his debut in 2016 with the mini-album When I Begin and quickly mesmerized listeners with his genuine expressions of life. Then in 2017 he released his own cover of 015B's Without All the Traces of Time and the success of the cover put him in the mainstream spotlight leading to more opportunities for him in the industry including soundtracks competition programs and radio shows. In this episode O.WHEN performs Today Would Not Someday Can't Hold You and Loser to comfort our hearts once again. Tune in to I'm LIVE and let him heal your soul!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the talented quintet ONEWE! ONEWE is an alternative rock band composed of YongHoon KangHyun HaRin DongMyeong and CyA. The band's name is a combination of one and and we shine on you which speaks to the members' ambition to shine on everyone and become one in the name of music. With exceptional talents in songwriting and lyric-writing the five young musicians never fail to impress listeners. Not surprisingly the quintet is expanding their audience reach both at home and abroad and their single Q entered the Billboard World Digital Song Sales Chart in April last year. Each member boasts his own distinctive musical talents so their music is versatile and kaleidoscopic yet harmonious. In this episode ONEWE performs Regulus Crazy ONEWE Medley and more to show off their musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these talented ambitious five artists!

programme.title: Spa Day
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean drives her and Miss Wince to their booked spa retreat.

programme.title: Charity Bean
programme.desc: Bean is both cajoled by Irma and spurred by his own jealousy of the fund-raising super-star Declan.

programme.title: Bean Encore
programme.desc: The Great Eduardo, violinist supreme, is in town and Irma wants to go to the concert.

programme.title: Mobile Home
programme.desc: Miss Wince takes Mrs. Wicket off on holiday in her brand-new, swanky caravan and Bean is left behind.

programme.title: Haunted House
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to impress some kids in the park with his football skills.

programme.title: Eau De Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean accidentally spills all of Mrs. Wicket's new, expensive perfume on the floor.

programme.title: Running On Empty
programme.desc: Mr Bean is on his way to the seaside when the mini runs out of petrol.

programme.title: Bean Bug
programme.desc: Scrapper gives Bean fleas, and Bean is forced to call in the pest control person.

programme.title: Coffee Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is out shopping when it starts to rain.

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wakes up on a freezing cold winter's morning to discover that the boiler is broken.

programme.title: Scrapper Cleans Up
programme.desc: Irma wants a romantic break Bean doesn't. It's too expensive.

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irma's Mum, at all costs.

programme.title: Save That Tree
programme.desc: Bean is showing Irma his favourite tree when he discovers a tree surgeon getting ready to cut it down.

programme.title: For Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket is persuaded by a jaunty estate agent to put her house up for sale.

programme.title: Jumping Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to learn skateboarding but hurts himself on his first try.

programme.title: Cat Chaos
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing.

programme.title: Stick It
programme.desc: Bean discovers Mrs. Wicket's nephew and Bruiser Jnr swopping football stickers.

programme.title: Bean At The Museum
programme.desc: Mr. Bean thinks he's just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden.

programme.title: A Car For Irma
programme.desc: Bean discovers Declan giving Irma a lift in his swanky new SUV.

programme.title: Trophy Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket's Nephew is staying with her when he wins two tickets to an Outward Bound course.

programme.title: In The Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Bean decides to become a wildlife photographer.

programme.title: Missing Teddy
programme.desc: Bean discovers that, in the world of organised crime, a teddy isn't always a teddy. Sometimes it's a rabbit.

programme.title: No Parking
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't find a parking space. So he makes one of his own.

programme.title: Bean's Bounty
programme.desc: Whilst digging for buried treasure, Mr Bean digs himself a hole too deep to get out of.

programme.title: Artful Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets a real bug for painting. Then several bugs… and flies and slugs and mice.

programme.title: The Fly
programme.desc: Bean fights a loosing battle with a winged beast from Hell.

programme.title: Spring Clean
programme.desc: Mr Bean finds that cleanliness can be a filthy business.

programme.title: No Pets
programme.desc: His landlady smells a fish when Mr Bean gets a bird.

programme.title: LUKOCHURI
programme.desc: Lukochuri is a sitcom and narrates the story of two thieves and how they eventually save a child's life and also help reforming the society.

programme.title: DAN PROTIDAN
programme.desc: "Dan Pratidan" is a story that revolves around a rich man Mr. Ashok, Who loses his mental balance after his wife's death. His cousin brother Dilip tortures him so as to find where he kept his chequebooks and property papers. Dilip's wife and his youngest brother Sudeep with the help of a lady doctor Geeta manage to cure Ashok and expose Dilip.

programme.title: Less than Evel Ep- 36
programme.desc: It is a crime drama about the psychological games between a detective with a strong sense of justice but tormented by the crimes he solves, and a genius woman who is insensitive to her own death. ~~ A remake of the UK series "Luther".

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Stung by the Devil's Toilet Paper!
programme.desc: The Devil's Toilet Paper is a painful plant you'll never forget. Coyote experiences its stinging hairs and shows what NOT to do in the wild.Mark takes on the venomous stonefish, famous for the world's most painful sting. This one's not for the faint of heart.

programme.title: Cutest Baby Rhino Ever!
programme.desc: The baby rhino may be adorable, but it still has wild instincts. Coyote bonds with one in a rescue center and learns about their conservation.What's the smallest chameleon in the world? Coyote discovers just how tiny it really is—and how it avoids being noticed in the wild.

programme.title: 5 Deadly Tick Bites You Need to Worry About!
programme.desc: A deep dive into the five most dangerous tick bites—what to look for, how to avoid them, and why they're more threatening than they seem.A fierce jungle standoff unfolds as a jaguar faces off with a caiman. Coyote breaks down the tactics, strength, and outcomes of this epic duel.

programme.title: Stung by a Bullet Ant! (Truth Revealed)
programme.desc: At long last, the bullet ant returns! Mark faces this infamous insect again to reveal updated insights into its sting—and why it's feared globally.Can gloves actually stop a venomous snake bite? Coyote puts bite-proof gear to the test against real fangs.

programme.title: Deadly Bite!? Blue Ring Octopus
programme.desc: Bright, beautiful, and deadly—the blue ring octopus carries venom strong enough to kill. Mark gets close to show what to look out for.A simple photo turns into a full-on wilderness blooper reel. Mark's attempt at the perfect selfie gets out of hand—literally.

programme.title: Did I Catch the Deadliest Snake in America?
programme.desc: Coyote may have caught the deadliest snake in the U.S. He examines its venom, behavior, and what makes it so feared among experts.Handling a black widow spider sounds insane, but Coyote does it to test bite behavior and safety protocols. Proceed with caution!

programme.title: Stung by a Stonefish! (Rare Freshwater Version)
programme.desc: A rare freshwater stonefish delivers one of the most painful stings Mark has ever endured. It's both risky and riveting.The thorny devil lizard is covered in spikes and full of surprises. Mark explores its desert defenses and water-collecting superpowers.

programme.title: Area 51 Plane Crash – We Found It!
programme.desc: Mark explores a remote crash site in the desert rumored to be tied to Area 51. What he finds is strange, twisted, and possibly historic.Man O' War jellyfish are not true jellyfish—but they're still deadly. Mark gets stung and showcases their long, venomous tentacles.

programme.title: Zombie Toads Rise from the Desert!
programme.desc: Zombie toads rise! Mark uncovers a strange desert phenomenon that brings seemingly dead amphibians back to life after heavy rains.Killer bees aren't just a legend. Coyote cracks open a hive to show how aggressive—and fascinating—these insects really are.

programme.title: Camera Trap Catches Rare Animal!
programme.desc: Coyote sets up a hidden camera trap and captures never-before-seen animal behavior in the wild. The footage is stunning and unexpected.One of Mark's most anticipated stings—the warrior wasp! With a pain rating system in place, he breaks down exactly how intense it is.

programme.title: Stung by an Electric Caterpillar!
programme.desc: This episode features a painful sting from the electric caterpillar, a bizarre jungle dweller with venomous barbs. It's shocking—literally.A sting from Japan's meanest wasp! This aggressive insect doesn't hold back. Mark's reaction is both painful and fascinating.

programme.title: Human Blood vs. Snake Venom!
programme.desc: Coyote tests what happens when human blood encounters snake venom in a controlled, educational experiment. He breaks down the biology, effects, and fascinating science behind venom.

programme.title: Top 13 Most Painful Insect Stings Coyote Peterson Has Ever Taken!
programme.desc: Coyote ranks the top 13 most painful insect stings he's ever taken. From bullet ants to wasps, it's a countdown filled with pain and science. From sand to sea, Coyote builds a mini mudflat aquarium packed with bizarre marine creatures. It's a deep dive into ocean ecology.

programme.title: Exploring Most Haunted House in America!
programme.desc: Spooky vibes abound as Coyote explores one of America's most haunted houses. What's real? What's legend? Only one way to find out. Pain is part of the job, but this one really hurts. Coyote's wild encounter leads to a cringeworthy injury and a valuable field lesson.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas uncovers the revolutionary spirit woven into the music of St. Croix, where sound has long served as a rallying cry for justice and identity. Through the powerful perspectives of Mada Nile, Ras Attitude, Ras Bach, the Ay-Ay Cultural Dancers, and Kevin Williams, this episode explores how artists have used music to confront oppression, celebrate resilience, and inspire change — from the island's historic struggles to its modern-day movements.

programme.title: COFFEE The Ultimate Language
programme.desc: Rogers, Arkansas, is a vibrant city where rich history, and a thriving arts scene converge. ​In this episode Andrea Allen, US Barista Champion, Visits 2 woman owned shops roasting and serving Rogers in a big way.
